kpi_trends.notes: Second-derivative KPI signals (YoY basis) from SEC XBRL fundamentals, equity models and news flow.

sumzero_ideas.notes: Local SumZero Ideas archive index; raw documents stay out of git.

tracked_funds_13f.notes: Curated great-fund / value-shop 13F portfolio overlay (make tracked-funds-13f-ingest).

source_universe.notes: Canonical registry of live + evaluation data sources we pull from.

selected_tools.name: Better EDGAR
selected_tools.dashboard_role: SEC filing retrieval and cleaner document discovery

terminalvalue.title: Better EDGAR
terminalvalue.description: The EDGAR you wish existed — cross-issuer search, a live filings feed, enriched 8-K/6-K exhibits, Form 4 + 13F, and email/RSS/JSON/MCP/API delivery.
terminalvalue.key_feature: Filings news feed + cross-issuer search (no ticker required)
terminalvalue.best_for: monitoring sec filing activity and market developments across multiple issuers or sectors simultaneously
terminalvalue.overview: sec filing dashboard and search tool that surfaces recent 8-k/6-k filings, insider form 4 trades, and 13f holdings across all issuers without requiring a ticker first. supports cross-issuer filtering by market cap, sector, form type, 8-k item, and exhibit label; delivers results via web, email digest, rss, json api, or mcp integration to chatgpt/claude.

selected_tools.name: Daloopa
selected_tools.dashboard_role: normalized KPIs and model-ready company data

terminalvalue.title: Daloopa
terminalvalue.description: AI-extracted, audit-ready financial data for 5,500+ global tickers — every number hyperlinked to its primary source for one-click verification.
terminalvalue.key_feature: >99% accurate, source-linked financials with Excel add-in
terminalvalue.best_for: analysts at hedge funds, mutual funds, and investment banks building and updating financial models — also supports builders creating financial ai agents.
terminalvalue.overview: ai-extracted fundamental data for 5,500+ global public companies, delivered via excel add-in, api, mcp server, and data sheets. every data point hyperlinked to its original source filing (sec, press releases, investor presentations, transcripts) for one-click verification. covers 14 years of history with 4-10x more kpis per ticker than other providers, updated during earnings with >99% accuracy.

terminalvalue.title: EDGAR Analyst
terminalvalue.description: Pulls SEC filings from EDGAR, extracts structured data, redlines disclosure changes across periods, and generates cited analysis within 60 seconds of filing publication
terminalvalue.key_feature: word-level redlines across filing periods with materiality scoring
terminalvalue.overview: pulls sec filings from edgar, extracts structured line items from tables/segments/footnotes, redlines word-level changes across filing periods with materiality scoring, and generates cited analysis within 60 seconds of publication. runs monitors on any ticker that trigger custom analysis on new filings and deliver results via email/slack/webhook before press releases land.
terminalvalue.best_for: hedge fund analysts, sell-side researchers, family office portfolio managers, and private equity teams reading sec filings under time pressure.
terminalvalue.auto_add_notes: Free reader tier visible, paid plans with 7-day trial mentioned but no numeric pricing shown on any page; pricing inferred as FREE-$$ based on freemium SaaS pattern; SOC2 Type II in progress signals p

selected_tools.name: Earnings API
selected_tools.dashboard_role: earnings calendar and reported earnings coverage

terminalvalue.title: Earnings API
terminalvalue.description: Provides REST API access to historical and upcoming earnings calendar data for NYSE and NASDAQ stocks with date-based queries, post-earnings reactions, and structured JSON responses for automated workflows.
terminalvalue.key_feature: date-based earnings calendar with beat/miss data plus post-report price/volume
terminalvalue.overview: rest api returning historical and upcoming earnings calendar data for nyse and nasdaq stocks. date-based queries for pre/after-market earnings schedules, estimate vs. actual eps and revenue, plus optional post-earnings price/volume reactions. structured json for backfills, daily syncs, and automation workflows.
terminalvalue.best_for: fintech products building earnings alerts, newsletters, quant dashboards, or research platforms that need calendar imports and scheduled event syncs.
terminalvalue.auto_add_notes: Free tier 100/day, 1k/mo. Paid tiers not shown but implied by 'Paid access' mention. Company (ToS, privacy, dashboard infra). Earnings calendar + reactions = core product.

terminalvalue.key_feature: API designed natively for LLM agents (not human dashboards)
terminalvalue.best_for: ai financial agents, quantitative research platforms, portfolio management systems, and event-driven trading infrastructure
terminalvalue.overview: stock-market data api serving real-time and historical financials, sec filings, kpis, insider trades, institutional holdings, and price data across 27,000+ us tickers with 30+ years of history. designed for programmatic consumption by ai agents and llm pipelines — structured json responses, section-level filing access, data available within seconds of publication.

terminalvalue.best_for: analyzing and replicating institutional investor portfolios using quarterly 13F and Schedule 13D/G data.
